message:
fix: WebSocket connect timeout, RaptorQ idempotent emit, and minor cleanups

Three targeted fixes:

- websocket/client.rs: Honor WebSocketConfig::connect_timeout when
  present — use TcpStream::connect_timeout() instead of the unlimited
  TcpStream::connect(). Previously the connect_timeout field was
  defined but never consulted during the connection phase.

- raptorq/systematic.rs: Make emit_systematic() idempotent — repeated
  calls now return an empty batch and leave stats unchanged instead of
  re-emitting source symbols. emit_all() updated to skip source emission
  when systematic symbols have already been emitted. Also fix import
  ordering (gf256_addmul_slice before Gf256).

- time/sleep.rs: Minor formatting — collapse two-line let binding for
  deadline.as_nanos().saturating_sub() onto one line.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
